issues.title: jackson-databind before 2.13.0 allows a Java StackOverflow exception and denial of service via a large depth of nested objects.

advisory.title: Deeply nested json in jackson-databind

issues.title: In FasterXML jackson-databind before versions 2.13.4.1 and 2.12.17.1, resource exhaustion can occur because of a lack of a check in primitive value deserializers to avoid deep wrapper array nesting, when the UNWRAP_SINGLE_VALUE_ARRAYS feature is enabled.

advisory.title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption in Jackson-databind

remediations.details: Disable UNWRAP_SINGLE_VALUE_ARRAYS feature or upgrade to 2.13.4.1 or later

issues.title: In FasterXML jackson-databind before 2.13.4, resource exhaustion can occur because of a lack of a check in BeanDeserializer._deserializeFromArray to prevent use of deeply nested arrays. An application is vulnerable only with certain customized choices for deserialization.

advisory.title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption in FasterXML jackson-databind
